svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="AUTOSAR - DCM and DEM" id="autosar-dcm-dem-fixed"> <mxGraphModel dx="971" dy="1940" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="AUTOSAR Classic Platform — Where DCM & DEM Sit" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="840" x="80" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="appLayer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eaf2ff;strokeColor=#3b6fb6;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="Application Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="840" x="80" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="appLayerSub" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;" value="Software Components (SWCs) — monitors report faults; app logic calls diagnostic services" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="820" x="90" y="71" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rte" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff3d6;strokeColor=#c99a2e;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="RTE (Runtime Environment)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="38" width="840" x="80" y="118" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bswOuter" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f6f6f6;strokeColor=#888888;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=15;spacingTop=8;arcSize=5;" value="Basic Software (BSW) — Services Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="290" width="840" x="80" y="182" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sysServ" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="System Services" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="216" width="260" x="100" y="214" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dem" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe0dc;strokeColor=#b83f2e;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;fontColor=#6b1d0d;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="DEM
Diagnostic Event Manager

Event/DTC status, freeze frame,
extended data, aging/healing
reports to DCM on request" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="230" x="115" y="243" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sysServOthers" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#444444;" value="EcuM · ComM · BswM · FiM
Det · Dlt" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="230" x="115" y="345" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="commServ" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="Communication Services" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="216" width="270" x="375" y="214" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dcm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d9ecff;strokeColor=#1f5fa8;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;fontColor=#0d3a6b;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="DCM
Diagnostic Communication Manager

UDS (ISO 14229) service handling,
sessions, security, DID/routine
requests to/from tester" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="240" x="390" y="243" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="comMgr" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=10.5;fontStyle=1;" value="COM Manager" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="400" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pduR" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=10.5;fontStyle=1;" value="PduR" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="520" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="commServOthers" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10.5;fontColor=#444444;" value="CanTp/CanIf · SoAd (DoIP)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="270" x="375" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="memServ" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="Memory Services" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="216" width="240" x="660" y="214" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nvm" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="NvM" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="80" x="740" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nvmSub" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10.5;fontColor=#555555;" value="(NVRAM Manager)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="240" x="660" y="292" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="memOthers" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#444444;" value="MemIf
Fee / Ea" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="240" x="660" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeDemToDcm" edge="1" parent="1" source="dem" style="edges=1;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=8.5;fontColor=#7a1f9c;strokeColor=#7a1f9c;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;" target="dcm" value="DTC request"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeDcmToDem" edge="1" parent="1" source="dcm" style="edges=1;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=8.5;fontColor=#7a1f9c;strokeColor=#7a1f9c;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0;exitY=0.65;entryX=1;entryY=0.65;" target="dem" value="DTC data"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeDemToNvm" edge="1" parent="1" source="dem" style="edges=1;html=1;endArrow=block;dashed=1;fontSize=8.5;strokeColor=#444444;strokeWidth=1.2;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;exitX=0.112;exitY=0.988;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="nvm" value="store/restore event data"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="140.81" y="370" /> <mxPoint x="140" y="370" /> <mxPoint x="140" y="460.07" /> <mxPoint x="690" y="460.07" /> <mxPoint x="690" y="275.04" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="60" y="340" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ecuAbs" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="ECU Abstraction Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="800" x="100" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mcal" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="Microcontroller Abstraction Layer (MCAL)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="100" y="548" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e6e6e6;strokeColor=#555555;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Microcontroller Hardware" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="840" x="80" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arr1" edge="1" parent="1" source="appLayer" style="edges=1;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#444444;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="rte"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arr2" edge="1" parent="1" source="rte" style="edges=1;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#444444;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="bswOuter"> <mxGeometry
